Alibaba soars on AI rally, reaching highest level since 2022.
Industrial sector and industry performance stats from Bloomberg: strong numbers reported.
Earnings scheduled for February 13th, 2025 show various companies reporting with revenue and earnings estimates.

Some key numbers include: - Penske Automotive Group (PAG): Earnings expected at $3.29 per share on revenue of $7.57 billion- Brookfield (BN): Earnings projected at $0.88 per share on revenue of $1.32 billion- TransUnion (TRU): Earnings projected at $0.96 per share on revenue of $1.03 billion- American Electric Power (AEP): Earnings expected at $1.22 per share on revenue of $4.87 billion- Deere (DE): Earnings projected at $3.11 per share on revenue of $7.69 billion- Honda Motor Co (HMC): Earnings for the third quarter- Sony Gr (SONY): Earnings estimated at $0.29 per share on revenue of $24.32 billion- ASE Tech Holding Co (ASX): Earnings likely at $0.15 per share on revenue of $5.83 billion- Barclays (BCS): Earnings estimated at $0.19 per share on revenue of $6.57 billion- TELUS (TU): Earnings projected at $0.15 per share on revenue of $5.24 billionThese reports, amongst others, will be available on Benzinga.com for further details.

news.headline: Gupshup showcases AI agents at LEAP 2025 in Saudi Arabia, leading Conversational AI platform.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on February 13, 2025, Gupshup, a renowned Conversational AI platform, presented its advanced AI Agent features at LEAP 2025, a top technology event in the country. After a successful showcase, the company revealed its latest updates, with the event drawing attention to its innovative AI capabilities.

news.headline: Global Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell Market to reach USD 13,238.06 Million by 2034, at 14.68% CAGR. Key growth drivers include govt initiatives and increased demand for clean energy solutions.
news.summary: The article discusses the global Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell (PEMFC) market, forecasting its growth from approximately USD 3,364.71 million in 2024 to an estimated value of around USD 13,238.06 million by 2034. The compound annual growth rate (CAGR) is expected to be about 14.68% during the period from 2025 to 2034. PEMFCs convert chemical energy into electrical energy through the electrochemical reaction of hydrogen and oxygen, providing high efficiency and low greenhouse gas emissions. Factors driving market growth include government initiatives supporting clean energy solutions, demand for renewable energy storage, and low-emission backup power needs. Challenges include competition from alternative electric vehicles and high hydrogen production costs. The report segments the market by type, material, application, and region, with the Asia Pacific region currently leading due to government support and key industry players. North America and Europe are also expected to see significant growth, driven by government targets and investment in research and development. Contunuous research efforts focus on improving PEMFC technology and expanding its applications. The report provides in-depth industry analysis and revenue estimation, with a free sample available for further insights.

news.headline: Tune into Bloomberg on 2/13/2024 to catch Insight with Host Haslinda Amin.
Global home Wi-Fi router market to grow by USD 3.34 billion (2025-2029) due to e-learning surge, AI influence - Technavio
news.summary: A recent report detailing the influence of AI on market trends reveals that the global home wi-fi router market is projected to increase by approximately USD 3.34 billion between 2025 and 2029. The growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.5% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Roanoke Insurance Group marks 90 years of excellence and innovation in logistics & trade insurance since its 1935 inception.
news.summary: Roanoke Insurance Group is marking a significant milestone, commemorating its 90 years of operation as a leading and reliable company in the logistics and trade insurance sector. Established in 1935 in Chicago, Illinois, Roanoke has maintained a position of leadership by introducing groundbreaking solutions tailored to meet the industry's evolving needs. Over nearly a century, the company has built a reputation for excellence and has become a trusted partner for clients seeking specialized insurance services.

news.headline: Trepp introduces AI search tool to improve use of TreppCRE for real estate professionals. Expands capabilities.
news.summary: A major data firm, Trepp, unveiled groundbreaking artificial intelligence (AI) technology on Feb. 12, 2025. The innovative AI tools introduced include AI search, aimed at improving user experience with TreppCRE. This new feature is set to revolutionize how industry experts access and interpret data from TreppCRE, a move that solidifies Trepp's position as a forward-thinking leader in the field. This development is expected to significantly impact professionals in the industry and is a testament to Trepp's commitment to innovation and efficiency in data management.

news.headline: National Dental launches Smyles For Heroes program to donate full arch dental restoration services to 1 qualifying veteran or first responder each month. Applications accepted online at SmylesForHeroes.com. New York, Feb. 12, 2025.
news.summary: National Dental will choose one eligible veteran or first responder each month who is missing multiple teeth or currently using a denture. Nominations can be submitted online at SmylesForHeroes.com. The initiative was launched in New York on February 12, 2025, by Dr. Nitin at National Dental.

news.headline: Paris Baguette plans to expand in North America with a target of 1,000 locations by 2030, establishing its first manufacturing plant in Texas.
news.summary: A popular franchise cafe inspired by French bakery culture is rapidly expanding, with plans to achieve a significant milestone of 1,000 outlets throughout North America by 2030. The company's headquarters in Moonachie, New Jersey announced this ambitious goal on February 12, 2025. Paris Baguette, renowned for its expertly made pastries and artisanal breads, is set to dominate the market with its growth plans.

news.headline: UFC® and Monster Energy® renew global partnership, with Monster serving as exclusive global drink partner.
news.summary: The renowned mixed martial arts organization UFC®, affiliated with TKO Group Holdings (NYSE: TKO), and Monster Energy, a leading energy drink brand, have recently confirmed a multiyear extension of their established collaboration. This deal ensures Monster Energy remains the sole global partner for UFC®, maintaining their ongoing support.

news.headline: USA DeBusk LLC acquires CIMA Inspection, enhancing NDT capabilities. DEER PARK, Feb. 12, 2025. #IndustrialServices #Acquisition #NDT
news.summary: Deer Park, Texas - On February 12, 2025, USA DeBusk LLC, a prominent industrial services provider, made a strategic decision to expand and reinforce their non-destructive testing capabilities. This move aims to augment their overall multi-service value proposition. The company's objective is to enhance their offerings to the energy sector and beyond. This strategic decision underscores their commitment to growth and diversification.

news.headline: Ephlux partners with Denovo to bring no-code platform to North America's biggest JD Edwards customer base, announced on Feb. 12, 2025.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Ephlux, a leading global enterprise specializing in no-code app automation, and Denovo, a major North American provider of JD Edwards (JDE) consulting and cloud managed services. The collaboration was made official in Louisville, Colorado on February 12, 2025. Ephlux's expertise in no-code app automation combined with Denovo's strong presence in JDE services is anticipated to bring unparalleled benefits to clients.

news.headline: Upper Deck Golf partners with PXG for 25-event stadium tour in 2025, visiting MLB, NFL, and College stadiums across the US.
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona - Upper Deck Golf, a top golf entertainment company, has disclosed plans for a groundbreaking 25-event stadium tour in 2025. The tour will include stops at various MLB, NFL, and College stadiums across the country. This initiative aims to bring golf entertainment to a wider audience and create a unique experience for fans. The company also shared news of a new multi-year partnership that will further enhance their offerings.

news.headline: USF to honor Bill Russell with inaugural 'Bill Russell Impact Classic' and series of events, commemorating his legacy and achievements, including leading the USF Dons to two consecutive national championships 70 years ago.
news.summary: The University of San Francisco is delighted to share details about upcoming events to celebrate the accomplishments and enduring impact of Bill Russell. The events will feature an annual men's basketball game dedicated to Russell, recognizing his pivotal role in leading the USF Dons to back-to-back national titles 70 years ago. Russell left a lasting legacy and had a remarkable career, contributing significantly to the university's athletic history.

news.headline: TeamLogic IT ranked #1 in IT Services by Entrepreneur Magazine's 2025 Franchise 500 list, solidifying its position in the industry.
news.summary: TeamLogic IT, a leading provider of managed IT services and technology support for businesses across the nation, proudly reveals it has secured the top position in the IT Services category on Entrepreneur's prestigious Franchise 500 list for 2025. This recognition highlights TeamLogic IT's excellence and dedication in the industry.

news.headline: Mercy Medical Center in Baltimore named a top mid-size employer by Forbes for the 6th time in 2025.
news.summary: Forbes magazine, a renowned national business publication, has recognized Mercy Medical Center in Baltimore, Maryland as one of the top midsize employers in the U.S. for 2025. The ranking is specifically for companies with 1,000-5,000 employees. This marks the sixth occasion that Mercy has achieved this prestigious accolade. The announcement was made in Baltimore on February 12, 2025.

news.headline: New Pocketbook 'Intro to AI for Parents' by ReadyAI helps parents engage kids in AI discussions. Transforming world; AI shaping how we live, learn, work.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based ReadyAI has introduced "Intro to AI for Parents: A Pocketbook" to help families understand Artificial Intelligence. Released on Feb. 12, 2025, the pocketbook aims to demystify AI as it becomes increasingly influential in our daily lives. With AI rapidly changing how we function, this resource serves to educate parents about its impact.

news.headline: Hirezon launches enhanced MyReferred™ platform for talent acquisition in higher education, refined based on customer feedback.
news.summary: Hirezon, a prominent provider of cloud-based HR technology specializing in higher education, has recently introduced an improved edition of MyReferred™ on their website. This innovative talent acquisition platform has been significantly enhanced following customer input, setting a new benchmark in employee referral programs within the industry.

news.headline: Elizabeth Mestnik Acting Studio (EMAS) unveils enhanced website, introduces new class offerings for 2025, focusing on Meisner Technique.
news.summary: In the latest update, the Elizabeth Mestnik Acting Studio (EMAS) has unveiled a revamped website for the year 2025. The updated site promises enhanced user experience and an array of new class options, such as Acting Workshops and Coaching. Despite the introduction of these additional programs, EMAS continues to prioritize its foundation in the Meisner Technique.

news.headline: Explore 14 unique ways to celebrate Valentine's Day in Costa Mesa, presented by Travel Costa Mesa.
news.summary: Discover a variety of date ideas for Valentine's Day in Costa Mesa, California. Travel Costa Mesa showcases options for romantic partners, best friends, and solo adventurers. Whether looking for classic or unique experiences, there are plenty of choices available. With Valentine's Day approaching, this guide offers inspiration for those seeking to celebrate in Costa Mesa.

news.headline: Dr. Irfan Atcha named one of America's Best Dentists 2025 for excellence in patient care, innovation in dentistry.
news.summary: Renowned Implantologist Dr. Irfan Atcha has recently been honored as one of America's Best Dentists for the year 2025. With a focus on dental implants, Dr. Atcha is highly esteemed for his exceptional patient care and significant contributions to the field of dentistry. This prestigious recognition underscores his commitment to innovation and excellence in dentistry.

news.headline: Dr. Irfan Atcha named one of Top 100 doctors in Implant and Cosmetic Dentistry by Top 100 magazine in Chicago, Feb. 12, 2025.
news.summary: Renowned dental implant surgeon Dr. Irfan Atcha has been acknowledged in the Top 100 magazine for his exceptional work in the field of Implant and Cosmetic Dentistry. The latest issue, released on February 12, 2025, features him among the top doctors recognized as leaders and influencers. Dr. Atcha's expertise has earned him a spot in this prestigious list, celebrating his contributions to the field.

news.headline: Restore smile with dental implants at Britten Periodontics. Innovative solution for lost teeth due to injury or disease.
news.summary: Many individuals have the opportunity to preserve a strong and attractive smile throughout their lifetime through consistent oral care practices such as brushing, flossing, and dental check-ups. Yet, in cases where teeth are lost due to various reasons like injury, disease, or decay, dental implants present a groundbreaking option for restoring both functionality and aesthetics. The team at Britten Periodontics specializes in providing this innovative solution, ensuring individuals can regain a confident smile.

news.headline: "New book reveals Nikola Tesla's lost secrets and forbidden love, includes never-before-seen letters and schematics."
news.summary: A ground-breaking novel, titled "Tesla: Manhattan Dove to Queens Seagull," released in Dunedin, Florida, on February 13, 2025, has unearthed hidden letters, schematics, and explosive revelations about the enigmatic inventor. This biographical novel sheds light on the mysterious figure with never-before-seen insights.

news.headline: Wondercide offers tips to safeguard pets during winter freeze. Important to protect animals during cold weather. Austin, Texas, Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: The arrival of winter is in full force with freezing temperatures hitting hard. It's crucial to remember that pets are also affected by the cold weather. Wondercide, based in Austin, Texas, emphasizes the importance of safeguarding pets during winter by offering valuable tips for their safety. This information was shared on Feb. 13, 2025, through a press release distributed by PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Taiwan readies for Trump's tariffs, adapting to a new U.S. dynamic. Officials push energy deals and defend semiconductor industry in Washington.
news.summary: Officials from Taiwan are addressing a shift in their relationship with the United States by visiting Washington to propose energy agreements and advocate for the protection of the island's semiconductor industry.

news.headline: EIT Food Accelerator Network reveals 2025 Corporate Programme Partners: AAK, Avril, Barry Callebaut Group, Carbery, Cargill.
news.summary: Belgium's city of Leuven witnessed a significant announcement on February 13, 2025, as EIT Food Accelerator Network and EIT Food Corporate Venturing Services revealed their esteemed Corporate Programme Partners for the year. A total of seven industry leaders have been selected: AAK, Avril, Barry Callebaut Group, Carbery Group, Cargill, Peter Cremer Holding GmbH & Co. KG, and Deutsche. This collaboration underscores the commitment towards innovation and growth within the food sector.

news.headline: RIOT Platforms reshapes board, eyes AI ventures for asset value boost, with Evercore and Northland Capital Markets advising.
news.summary: Riot Platforms has revealed the appointment of new board members and strategic plans to explore opportunities in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC) as part of their efforts to boost asset value. The company has enlisted Evercore and Northland Capital Markets to provide advisory services in this initiative.

news.headline: Cruises.com introduces Cruises.com Rewards program which allows customers to earn points on every cruise to redeem for exclusive rewards.
news.summary: Cruises.com has unveiled Cruises.com Rewards, a novel points-based rewards program for customers to earn points on each cruise booking. Based on the recent announcement in Wakefield, Massachusetts on February 13, 2025, customers can accumulate points with every cruise they book through this pioneering program. These points can be redeemed for exclusive rewards, marking a new era in the cruise booking sector. This initiative offers a unique opportunity for customers to benefit from their bookings through accumulating points, providing an enhanced overall experience for cruisegoers.

news.headline: BRI reports profit of IDR 60.64 trillion in 2024, showcasing resilience. MSMEs supported.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia, as of February 13, 2025, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (IDX: BBRI) remains strong in the face of economic difficulties, revealing a combined net profit of IDR 60.64 trillion for the year 2024. Sunarso, the President Director of BRI, announced this success.

news.headline: TENN grows, expands funding to £1bn, launches new UK facility for mid-tier clients with varied asset portfolios.
news.summary: In London, a prominent capital provider for high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth individuals, TENN, is experiencing significant growth. They have expanded their funding mix to exceed £1 billion and have introduced a new capital facility tailored for the UK market. The decision to enter the UK market was primarily influenced by demand from their professional associates, aimed at catering to clients with moderate capital needs and diverse asset portfolios in the UK. TENN's reputation for superior service remains a driving force behind their expansion efforts.

news.headline: Barclays CEO discusses deregulation and trading performance on Bloomberg.
XCMG Crane delivers multiple overseas orders in 2025, strengthening global market presence.
news.summary: In Xuzhou, China, as of February 13, 2025, XCMG Crane, a prominent heavy machinery company, has successfully sent out a range of valuable equipment to overseas customers. This achievement has set a strong foundation for the year, showcasing the company's growing presence in the worldwide market. The exact number of equipment shipped and the total value of these shipments have not been disclosed.

news.headline: Global transportation management systems market to grow by USD 4.74 billion (2025-2029) at a CAGR of over 11.7%, driven by AI and smart-connected devices.
news.summary: In a recent report analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends, it was projected that the global transportation management systems market will see a significant increase in size, with an estimated growth of USD 4.74 billion between 2025 and 2029. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 11.7% during this period.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest GBP, CHF, EUR, CAD, NZD, JPY, AUD, USD - Weakest
Newronika secures €13.6M in Series B funding led by Fondazione ENEA Tech e Biomedical to advance adaptive DBS platform.
news.summary: In Milan on February 13, 2025, Newronika, a prominent company specializing in advanced deep brain stimulation, has revealed the completion of its Series B funding round, securing a total of €13.6 million. The investment was primarily supported by Fondazione ENEA Tech e Biomedical, a new investor in the company. This funding round marks a significant milestone for Newronika as it continues to innovate in the field of deep brain stimulation.

news.headline: ION Commodities partners with Avalara for tax compliance in energy trading; a global leader in energy management teams up with a cloud-based tax automation provider.
news.summary: In London on February 13, 2025, ION Commodities, a prominent company specializing in energy and commodity management solutions, revealed its collaboration with Avalara, a top provider of cloud-based tax compliance automation for companies worldwide. This strategic partnership aims to enhance services and support for businesses of varying scales.

news.headline: RED Digital introduces Z-mount versions of V-RAPTOR and KOMODO cameras, available for preorder at B&H.
news.summary: In a recent video news update, it was revealed that RED Digital Cinema is incorporating the Nikon Z-Mount into their V-RAPTOR and KOMODO cinema cameras. This development includes the introduction of Z-to-PL adapters equipped with drop-in ND filters. The announcement, made in New York on February 13, 2025, demonstrates RED's commitment to innovation in their products. The updated V-RAPTOR and KOMODO models are generating excitement among filmmakers and camera enthusiasts.

news.headline: Protocol launches mainnet to bypass intermediaries, aiming to reduce legal hassles for IP owners in a trillions-worth industry.
news.summary: The network's goal is to minimize legal obstacles for owners of intellectual property (IP) in order to access the vast multi-trillion-dollar industry.

news.headline: Latent Labs secures $50M funding to enhance AI-powered biology - led by Dr Simon Kohl from DeepMind; $40M included.
news.summary: A company known as Latent Labs, which focuses on developing AI foundation models for customizable biology applications, has recently revealed its emergence from stealth with a total of $50 million in funding. Dr. Simon Kohl, the founder of the company, formerly served as a co-lead on DeepMind's protein design team and as a key research scientist on DeepMind's AlphaFold2 project. This project was recognized with a Nobel Prize in Chemistry awarded to Demis Hassabis and John Jumper. The funding acquired includes a substantial $40 million injection.

news.headline: Toshiba showcases retail solutions at EuroCIS in Germany focused on secure, seamless, and personalized shopping experience.
news.summary: In Neuss, Germany, Toshiba will showcase its innovative solutions at EuroCIS that cater to secure, seamless, and personalized shopping experiences for attendees.

news.headline: VOOPOO VINCI Spark220 redefines vaping with advanced design. Aiming to bring cosmic beauty to users.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, the vaping industry is experiencing a period of stagnation, characterized by uninspired designs and predictable performance. Current devices are often described as relics of the past - bulky, unexciting, and lacking innovation. However, there is now a vision to transform vaping into something extraordinary - to embody the breathtaking beauty of the universe and place that marvel directly into the hands of consumers. Whether it be the SpaceX Starship blazing through the evening sky or the captivating allure of far-off galaxies, this initiative aims to infuse vaping with the constant drive and curiosity of humanity.

news.headline: Stora Enso's Annual Report for 2024 released on Feb. 13, 2025 at 9:30 EET. Visit storaenso.com/annualreport.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Stora Enso Oyj released its Annual Report and Remuneration Report for 2024 at 9:30 EET in Helsinki. The reports can be accessed at storaenso.com/annualreport. The Annual Report comprises a strategic report, corporate governance details, financial statements, and information on sustainability. This release provides shareholders and stakeholders with valuable insights into the company's performance over the past year. For more information, individuals can visit the designated website.

news.headline: Discover key guidelines for meme tokens, emphasizing community, security, and transparency to nurture successful meme economies. (Read More)
news.summary: Discover the key principles for meme tokens, with a particular emphasis on community development, safety, and openness, as per Linea's recommendations for cultivating prosperous meme markets. Explore further to gain valuable insights into enhancing the meme economy.

news.headline: German Defence Minister Pistorius: It would be naive to think the threat posed by Russia will subside even after any Ukraine peace agreement
Valmet's 2024 Financial Statements Review: Orders received rose, but Net sales and Comparable EBITA stayed stable.
news.summary: Valmet Oyj issued a stock exchange release at 9:00 a.m. EET on February 13, 2025, in ESPOO, Finland. In the period of October to December 2024, the company received new orders, with figures in brackets representing comparisons to the same period in the previous year.

news.headline: UK economy grows by 0.1%, offering relief to govt. amid efforts to boost investment and growth.
news.summary: The surprising uptick in growth alleviates strain on the administration, which has been aiming to boost investment and development efforts.
